# Plan Output Template

Use this template to structure the final plan output. Fill in all sections.

---

## Template

```markdown
# Project Implementation Plan: {PROJECT_NAME}

**Generated by:** Cortex Code Project Planner
**Date:** {DATE}
**Source:** {REQUIREMENTS_FILE}

---

## Executive Summary

{1-3 sentence overview of the project scope and what will be built.}

**Total Estimates (ranges):**

| Metric | Min | Max |
|--------|-----|-----|
| Cortex Code Time | {X} min | {Y} min |
| Human Effort | {X} min | {Y} min |
| Token Usage | {X}K | {Y}K |
| Snowflake Credits | {X} | {Y} |

---

## Work Breakdown

### Phase {N}: {Phase Name}

**Objective:** {What this phase accomplishes}
**Dependencies:** {Prior phases or external dependencies}

| # | Task | Type | Complexity | CoCo Time | Human Effort | Tokens (K) | Credits |
|---|------|------|-----------|-----------|-------------|-----------|---------|
| {id} | {description} | {type} | {S/M/C/VC} | {min-max} min | {min-max} min | {min-max}K | {min-max} |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

**Phase Subtotal:**

| Metric | Min | Max |
|--------|-----|-----|
| CoCo Time | {X} min | {Y} min |
| Human Effort | {X} min | {Y} min |
| Tokens | {X}K | {Y}K |
| Credits | {X} | {Y} |

{Repeat for each phase}

---

## Dependency Graph

```
Phase 1: {name}
  └─► Phase 2: {name}
        ├─► Phase 3a: {name}
        └─► Phase 3b: {name}
              └─► Phase 4: {name}
```

---

## Totals (with overhead)

Overhead applied: {multiplier}x for {reason}.

| Metric | Raw Min | Raw Max | Adjusted Min | Adjusted Max |
|--------|---------|---------|-------------|-------------|
| Cortex Code Time | {X} min | {Y} min | {X} min ({H}h) | {Y} min ({H}h) |
| Human Effort | {X} min | {Y} min | {X} min ({H}h) | {Y} min ({H}h) |
| Token Usage | {X}K | {Y}K | {X}K | {Y}K |
| Snowflake Credits | {X} | {Y} | {X} | {Y} |

---

## Assumptions & Risks

- {List key assumptions made during estimation}
- {List risks that could affect estimates}

## Recommendations

- {Suggested phasing or prioritization}
- {Areas where human expertise is critical}
- {Opportunities to parallelize work}

---

> **Disclaimer:** These estimates are approximations based on typical Cortex Code usage patterns. Actual values vary based on requirement complexity, iteration count, existing codebase size, and user interaction patterns. Token estimates include context reads, generation, and expected iterations. Credit estimates cover development-time compute only, not production workloads.
```

---

## Formatting Rules

1. Always convert minutes > 120 to hours (e.g., "150 min (2.5h)")
2. Round credits to 2 decimal places
3. Round token counts to nearest 5K for totals
4. Use S/M/C/VC shorthand in tables, spell out in descriptions
5. Group tasks into logical phases (typically: Foundation, Core Logic, Integration, Testing/Polish)
6. Show dependency graph as ASCII art
7. Always include the disclaimer
